# Request for Proposal (RFP) Template

## Purpose
Provide vendors with a structured request for proposal, including requirements, evaluation
criteria, and submission instructions.

## Audience
Procurement Lead, Vendor Management, Legal Counsel, Project Sponsor.

## Inputs
- Demand intake and business case.
- Technical requirements and scope baseline.

## Required Sections
- Overview and background
- Scope of work
- Vendor qualifications
- Technical requirements
- Service levels
- Pricing format
- Evaluation criteria
- Submission instructions
- Terms and conditions

## 1. Overview & Background
Provide context about the organization and the opportunity.

## 2. Scope of Work
Describe the services, deliverables, and timeline.

## 3. Vendor Qualifications
List required experience, certifications, and references.

## 4. Technical Requirements
| Requirement | Description | Mandatory | Response |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 5. Service Levels
| Service | Target | Measurement | Reporting |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  |  |  |  |

## 6. Pricing Format
Describe pricing structure (fixed price, time & materials, subscription). Provide required line
items.

## 7. Evaluation Criteria
Provide weights for each evaluation category. Reference the vendor evaluation scorecard
(`docs/templates/shared/vendor-evaluation-scorecard.xlsx`).

## 8. Submission Instructions
- **Submission deadline:**
- **Contact person:**
- **Required format:**
- **Questions deadline:**

## 9. Terms & Conditions
List key contractual, compliance, and security requirements.

## Acceptance Criteria
- RFP includes clear scope, requirements, and evaluation criteria.
- Submission instructions and deadlines are explicit.
